prompt_observations.prompt_text: How does red and near-infrared light fit into a home wellness routine?
prompt_observations.reason: The brand was not mentioned or recommended across observed surfaces, while the answers produced useful category framing.

surface_framing_summary.framing: Calm home wellness routine, relaxation, skincare, post-exercise recovery, screen-free reset moments and consistency.
observation_notes: Lower-risk routine framing focused on calm home wellness, relaxation, skincare, post-exercise recovery, screen-free reset moments and consistency.

surface_framing_summary.framing: Photobiomodulation, skincare, post-workout recovery and evening wind-down.
observation_notes: Higher-risk physiological and scientific language appeared, including photobiomodulation, collagen production, cellular turnover, inflammation, tissue repair and melatonin.

surface_framing_summary.framing: Practical setup, safety, expectation management, skin support and recovery.
observation_notes: Practical setup, safety and benefit-related language appeared, including skin support, recovery, pregnancy and light-sensitive medications.

notes: Manual AI visibility observations are review-only and must not be treated as final visibility metrics, population-level findings, verified facts or customer-facing claims.
